Cook's Assistant.name: Cook's Assistant
Cook's Assistant.startPoint: Speak to the [[Cook (Lumbridge)|Cook]] in the kitchen of [[Lumbridge Castle]].
Cook's Assistant.itemsRequired:
* [[Egg]] (can be obtained during the quest)
* [[Bucket of milk]]
**A [[bucket]] (if obtaining the milk during the quest)
* [[Pot of flour]]
**A [[pot]] (if obtaining the flour during the quest)

Demon Slayer.name: Demon Slayer
Demon Slayer.requirements: The ability to defeat a level 27 [[Delrith|demon]] aided by three level 20 [[Dark wizard]]s and two level 7 Dark wizards using the [[Silverlight]] in melee.
Demon Slayer.startPoint: Speak to [[Aris]] in the tent on the western side of [[Varrock Square]].
Demon Slayer.itemsRequired:
*A [[water]] container, such as a [[bucket of water]] (obtainable during the quest)
*25 [[bones]] (can't be [[noted]], but can be delivered in increments)
*1 [[coin]]

Shield of Arrav.name: Shield of Arrav
Shield of Arrav.requirements: A trustworthy friend or partner. Players can join the official [[chat-channel]] "OSRS SOA" to look for a partner.
Shield of Arrav.startPoint: [[Varrock]] Palace library. Talk to [[Reldo]], the librarian, located at the northern end of [[Varrock Castle]].
Shield of Arrav.itemsRequired:
*Phoenix Gang: 20 [[coins]]
*Black Arm Gang: 2 [[Phoenix crossbow]]s (obtained during the quest)

Sheep Shearer.name: Sheep Shearer
Sheep Shearer.startPoint: Speak to [[Fred the Farmer]] in the house by the [[sheep]] pen north of [[Lumbridge Castle]].
Sheep Shearer.itemsRequired:
*20 [[balls of wool]] (unnoted)
**[[Shears]] if obtaining [[wool]] to spin into balls of wool (obtained during the quest)

The Restless Ghost.name: The Restless Ghost
The Restless Ghost.requirements: Capable of killing or running away from a [[combat level]] 13 [[skeleton]].
The Restless Ghost.startPoint: Speak to [[Father Aereck]] in the chapel south-east of [[Lumbridge Castle]].

Ernest the Chicken.name: Ernest the Chicken
Ernest the Chicken.requirements: *The ability to defend from a level 22 [[Skeleton]].
Ernest the Chicken.startPoint: Speak to [[Veronica]], south of [[Draynor Manor]] by the gate.
Ernest the Chicken.itemsRequired:
* [[Spade]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Fish food]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Poison (item)|Poison]] (obtainable during the quest)

Vampyre Slayer.name: Vampyre Slayer
Vampyre Slayer.requirements: Able to defeat a [[combat level]] 34 [[Count Draynor|vampyre]] with a very high health recovery rate.
Vampyre Slayer.startPoint: Speak to [[Morgan]] in his house in [[Draynor Village]], just north of [[Ned]]'s house.
Vampyre Slayer.itemsRequired:
*[[Hammer]] (can be bought from the [[general store]] just north of the [[Blue Moon Inn]] for 1 [[coin]])
* [[Beer]] (obtainable during the quest for 2 [[coins]])
* [[Garlic]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Stake]] (obtained during the quest)

Imp Catcher.name: Imp Catcher
Imp Catcher.startPoint: Speak to [[Wizard Mizgog]] on the top floor of the [[Wizards' Tower]].

Prince Ali Rescue.name: Prince Ali Rescue
Prince Ali Rescue.requirements: The ability to get past [[aggressive]] [[combat level]] 26 [[jail guard]]s.
Prince Ali Rescue.startPoint: Speak to [[Hassan]] in the palace at [[Al Kharid]].
Prince Ali Rescue.itemsRequired:
*[[Soft clay]]
*3 [[balls of wool]]
*[[Yellow dye]] or 2 [[onion]]s and 5 [[coins]]
*[[Redberries]]
*[[Ashes]]
*[[Bucket of water]] or [[jug of water]] (obtainable during quest)
*[[Pot of flour]]
*[[Bronze bar]]
*[[Pink skirt]]
*3 [[beer]]s
*[[Rope]] (can be bought during the quest from [[Ned]] for 18 [[coins]])
*30-40 [[coins]] for the Al Kharid [[toll gate]] if not using teleports to and from Al Kharid

Doric's Quest.name: Doric's Quest
Doric's Quest.startPoint: Speak to [[Doric]] in the small house north of [[Falador]], just outside the east gate of [[Taverley]].
Doric's Quest.ironmanConcerns: *A method of obtaining [[iron ore]]: **[[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 15 [[Mining]] [boostable] to mine it **As a 1/20 drop from [[Flesh Crawlers]] in the [[Stronghold of Security]] **As a 1/8.667 drop from [[Mind Golem]]s in the [[Ruins of Camdozaal]] (requires [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Below Ice Mountain]]) **As a drop from [[Iron ore#Item sources|other monsters]]

Black Knights' Fortress.name: Black Knights' Fortress
Black Knights' Fortress.requirements: * [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] 12 [[Quest points]] [required to start] * The ability to evade level 33 [[Black Knight]]s
Black Knights' Fortress.startPoint: Speak to [[Sir Amik Varze]] on the 2nd floor[UK]3rd floor[US] of the [[White Knights' Castle]]'s western tower in [[Falador]].
Black Knights' Fortress.itemsRequired:
* [[Cabbage]] (can be obtained from the cabbage patch in [[Edgeville Monastery]] and [[South Falador Farm]], as well as [[Lumbridge Castle#Cellar|Lumbridge cellar]]. Cabbages obtained from [[Draynor Manor]] '''CANNOT''' be used)
* [[Iron chainbody]] (can be purchased at [[Horvik's Armour Shop]] in [[Varrock]] and from [[Wayne's Chains - Chainmail Specialist|Wayne's Chains]] in [[Falador]])
* [[Bronze med helm]] (can be purchased in the helmet shop in [[Barbarian Village]], spawns by the backdoor of [[Draynor Manor]])

Witch's Potion.name: Witch's Potion
Witch's Potion.startPoint: Talk to [[Hetty]] in her house in [[Rimmington]], south of [[Falador]] and west of [[Port Sarim]].
Witch's Potion.itemsRequired:
*[[Burnt meat]]
*[[Eye of newt]]
*[[Onion]]
*[[Rat's tail]] ''(only obtainable after starting the quest)''

The Knight's Sword.name: The Knight's Sword
The Knight's Sword.requirements: * [[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 10 [[Mining]] [boostable] [not required to start] * The ability to run from [[combat level|level]] 57 [[ice warrior]]s and level 53 [[ice giant]]s could help.
The Knight's Sword.startPoint: Speak to the [[squire]] in the courtyard of the [[White Knights' Castle]] in [[Falador]].
The Knight's Sword.itemsRequired:
* [[Redberry pie]] (not [[half a redberry pie]])
* 2 or 4 [[iron bar]]s (4 if you want your own [[blurite sword]])
*1-3 [[Blurite ore]] (obtained during the quest) - optionally an additional ore each for your own blurite sword and the Falador easy diary ''(Members only)''
* Any [[pickaxe]] (one spawns in Rimmington)
The Knight's Sword.ironmanConcerns: *A method to obtain iron bars: **[[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 15 [[Mining]] and [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 15 [[Smithing]] if smelting [[iron ore]] **Spawn in level 18 [[Wilderness]] north-west of the [[Ferox Enclave]], next to the bears west of the Graveyard of Shadows. Accessible via [[File:Minigame icon.png|link=Minigames|alt=Minigames]] Clan Wars [[Minigame Teleport]] **1/42.67 drop from [[dwarf|dwarves]] ([[File:Attack style icon.png|link=Combat level|alt=Combat level]] 10 ) in the mines under Falador **''(Members only)'' Spawn in [[Thurid's Brain Buckets]] on the [[Sunset Coast]] in [[Varlamore]] (requires [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Children of the Sun]] ) **''(Members only)'' 1/34.42 drop from sorting [[small salvage]] with [[File:Sailing icon.png|link=Sailing|alt=Sailing]] 15 [[Sailing]] *A method to obtain a redberry pie: **[[File:Cooking icon.png|link=Cooking|alt=Cooking]] 10 [[Cooking]] to cook one. A pie dish can be found in the [[Varrock Palace]] kitchen, and [[redberries]] can be picked just west of the [[South-east Varrock mine]] **''(Members only)'' Purchased from [[Romily Weaklax]] in the [[Cooks' Guild]] with [[File:Cooking icon.png|link=Cooking|alt=Cooking]] 32 [[Cooking]] and a [[chef's hat]] **''(Members only)'' Partial completion of [[Perilous Moons]] to purchase a Redberry pie from [[Yarnio]]

Goblin Diplomacy.name: Goblin Diplomacy
Goblin Diplomacy.startPoint: Speak to [[General Bentnoze]] or [[General Wartface]] in [[Goblin Village]].
Goblin Diplomacy.itemsRequired:
* 3 sets of [[Goblin mail]] (obtained during the quest)
* 1 [[Blue dye]] (or 2 [[woad leaves]] and 5 coins to obtain a blue dye from [[Aggie]])
** Offer 20 coins to [[Wyson the gardener]] and he will give you two woad leaves
* 1 [[Orange dye]] – created by combining [[red dye]] with [[yellow dye]]
** 1 [[Red dye]] (or 3 [[redberries]] and 5 coins to obtain a red dye from [[Aggie]])
** 1 [[Yellow dye]] (2 [[onion]]s and 5 coins to obtain a yellow dye from [[Aggie]])

Pirate's Treasure.name: Pirate's Treasure
Pirate's Treasure.requirements: Able to defeat or run away from a [[Combat level]] 4 [[gardener]].
Pirate's Treasure.startPoint: Speak to [[Redbeard Frank]] at the northernmost dock at [[Port Sarim]], just outside [[The Rusty Anchor]].
Pirate's Treasure.itemsRequired:
*[[Karamjan rum]] (obtainable during the quest for 30 coins)
*[[White apron]] (obtainable during the quest in Port Sarim at [[Gerrant's Fishy Business.]])
*60 [[coins]] (only 30 are needed if using a [[Ring of charos|Ring of charos(a)]])
*10 [[banana]]s (obtainable during the quest)
*[[Spade]] (obtainable during the quest)

Dragon Slayer I.name: Dragon Slayer I
Dragon Slayer I.requirements: * [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] 32 [[Quest points]] to enter the Champions' Guild [required to start] * The ability to defeat a level 83 [[Elvarg|dragon]]
Dragon Slayer I.startPoint: Speak to the [[Guildmaster]] in the [[Champions' Guild]].
Dragon Slayer I.itemsRequired: * [[Unfired bowl]] (can be made with [[soft clay]] on a [[Potter's Wheel]] with [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 8 [[Crafting]]) * [[Wizard's mind bomb]] (can be bought in the [[Rising Sun Inn]] in [[Falador]] or [[The Toad and Chicken]] in [[Burthorpe]]) * [[Lobster pot]] (can be bought from any [[Fishing shops|fishing shop]]) * [[Silk]] (can be bought from [[Thessalia]] for 30 coins or the [[Al Kharid]] silk stall for 3 coins -- members can steal it from the [[Ardougne]] [[silk stall]] with [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 20 [[Thieving]]) * [[Magic]]/[[ranged]] [[weapon]] as well as a [[law rune|law]] and [[air rune]] (to cast [[Telekinetic Grab]] if your Magic level is 33 or higher) '''or''' 10,000 coins * [[Hammer]] * [[Anti-dragon shield]] (obtainable during the quest) * 90 [[steel nails]] (Members can buy these from the [[Sawmill operator]] north-east of [[Varrock]], they can also be smithed at [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 34 [[Smithing]] using 6 [[steel bar]]s by all players) * 3 [[plank]]s (only normal planks work) ** [[Free-to-play]]: Pick up the spawns in the [[Graveyard of Shadows]], level 19 [[Wilderness]], or for a safer option, [[ornate lockbox]]es in the [[Camdozaal Vault]] after [[Below Ice Mountain]] ** [[Member]]: [[Plank#Spawns|Several other spawn locations]] or buy them at the [[sawmill]] * 2,000 [[coins]]
Dragon Slayer I.enemiesToDefeat:
* [[Zombie rat]]s ''(level 3)''*
* [[Ghost (Melzar's Maze)|Ghost]]s ''(level 19)''*
* [[Skeleton (Melzar's Maze)|Skeleton]]s ''(level 22)''*
* [[Zombie (Melzar's Maze)|Zombies]] ''(level 24)''*
* [[Melzar the Mad]] ''(level 43)''
* [[Lesser demon (Melzar's Maze)|Lesser demon]] ''(level 82)''
* [[Wormbrain]] ''(level 2) - optional''
* [[Elvarg]] ''(level 83)''

''An asterisk denotes that there is only one of each monster that drops the required key. They can be noted by small differences in appearance stated later in the guide.''
Dragon Slayer I.ironmanConcerns: * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 8 [[Crafting]] [boostable] to create an [[unfired bowl]] *(Free-to play only) [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 34 [[Smithing]] [boostable] to create [[steel nails]]

Druidic Ritual.name: Druidic Ritual
Druidic Ritual.startPoint: Speak to [[Kaqemeex]] in the stone circle north of [[Taverley]].
Druidic Ritual.itemsRequired:
*[[Raw bear meat]]
*[[Raw rat meat]]
*[[Raw beef]]
*[[Raw chicken]]

Lost City.name: Lost City
Lost City.requirements: *[[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 31 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [not required to start] *[[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] 36 [[Woodcutting]] [boostable] [not required to start] *Ability to kill a level 101 [[Tree spirit (Lost City)|Tree spirit]] with limited [[armour]] and [[weapons]].
Lost City.startPoint: Go to [[Lumbridge Swamp]]. Talk to the campers there.
Lost City.itemsRequired:
* [[Knife]]
* [[Woodcutting]] [[axe]] (you will need to bank the axe before accessing [[Entrana]] - you cannot use a blessed axe)
Lost City.enemiesToDefeat:
* [[Tree spirit (Lost City)|Tree Spirit]] ''(level 101)'' (Safespottable)  
* Multiple [[Zombie (Entrana Dungeon)|Zombies]] ''(level 25)'' (for a [[bronze axe]])
Lost City.ironmanConcerns: [[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] The player is required to go to [[Entrana]].

Witch's House.name: Witch's House
Witch's House.requirements: * The ability to defeat 4 monsters from level 19 to 53 without a break.
Witch's House.startPoint: Talk to the [[boy]] near the gate entrance of [[Taverley]].
Witch's House.itemsRequired:
*[[Cheese]] (You may wish to bring several in case you mess up. One source is in [[Draynor Village]] - [[Aggie]]'s house)
*[[Leather gloves]] or any of the gloves listed [[Gate (witch's house)#Gloves|here]] (obtainable during the quest, may take some time)

Merlin's Crystal.name: Merlin's Crystal
Merlin's Crystal.requirements:
Must be able to defeat a level 39 enemy.
You do not need to have an Attack level of 20 to free Merlin, you can 'Use' Excalibur on the crystal to free him.
Merlin's Crystal.itemsRequired:
*[[Bread]]
*[[Tinderbox]]
*[[Bucket of wax]] (obtainable during the quest with either the [[Beekeeper's outfit]] or [[insect repellent]]; a [[bucket]] spawns near the east gate of the beehive enclosure)
*[[Bat bones]] (obtainable during the quest)

Heroes' Quest.name: Heroes' Quest
Heroes' Quest.requirements: * A partner * [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] 55 [[Quest points]] [required to start] * [[File:Cooking icon.png|link=Cooking|alt=Cooking]] 53 [[Cooking]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Fishing icon.png|link=Fishing|alt=Fishing]] 53 [[Fishing]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore]] 25 [[Herblore]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 50 [[Mining]] [boostable] [not required to start] * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Shield of Arrav]] ** [[Lost City]] ** [[Merlin's Crystal]] ** [[Dragon Slayer I]]
Heroes' Quest.startPoint: Speak to [[Achietties]] by the entrance to the [[Heroes' Guild]], between [[Taverley]] and [[Burthorpe]].
Heroes' Quest.itemsRequired:
* [[Ice gloves]] (obtainable during the quest) or [[Smiths gloves (i)]]
* [[Fishing rod]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Fishing bait]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Dusty key]] (obtainable during the quest; if travelling to [[Taverley Dungeon]] for the [[lava eel]], without 70 [[Agility]]) '''OR''' a [[knife]] or [[slash weapon]] (if travelling to the [[Lava Maze]] for the [[lava eel]]) '''OR''' 60 [[Sailing]] level (if travelling to the [[Charred Dungeon]])
* [[Harralander potion (unf)]] (or a [[harralander]] and a [[vial of water]])
* [[Pickaxe]]
'''If you are a [[Black Arm Gang]] member''' (Note: If you are returning to the mansion after the quest to help another player, you do not need the black armour anymore):
* [[Black full helm]] (trimmed will not work)
* [[Black platebody]] (trimmed will not work)
* [[Black platelegs]] (plateskirt or trimmed will not work)
'''If you are a [[Phoenix Gang]] member:'''
* Some form of [[Ranged]] or [[Magic]] attack method
Heroes' Quest.enemiesToDefeat:
* [[Ice Queen]] ''(level 111)'' (unless you already have Ice Gloves)
* [[Entrana firebird]] ''(level 2)''
* [[Jailer]] ''(level 47, optional)''
* [[Grip]] ''(level 22)'' (for Phoenix Gang members only)
Heroes' Quest.ironmanConcerns:
[[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] The player briefly visits [[Entrana]].
*Obtaining black armour for Black Arm Gang members
**The helm and legs can be purchased from the [[Champions' Guild]] and the platebody can be obtained from [[Horvik's Armour Shop]] in [[Varrock]]

Scorpion Catcher.name: Scorpion Catcher
Scorpion Catcher.requirements: * [[File:Prayer icon.png|link=Prayer|alt=Prayer]] 31 [[Prayer]] [not boostable] [not required to start] * Completion of [[Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl]] * The ability to run past level 172 [[black demon]]s and level 64 [[poison spider]]s
Scorpion Catcher.startPoint: Speak to [[Thormac]] at the top floor of the [[Sorcerer's Tower]], south-east of the [[Ranging Guild]].
Scorpion Catcher.itemsRequired: *[[Dusty key]] (obtainable during the quest) or [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 70 [[Agility]] [boostable].
Scorpion Catcher.enemiesToDefeat: * [[Jailer]] ''(level 47)'' if you need to acquire the [[dusty key]]

Family Crest.name: Family Crest
Family Crest.requirements: * [[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 40 [[Mining]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 40 [[Smithing]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Magic icon.png|link=Magic|alt=Magic]] 59 [[Magic]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 40 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [not required to start] * The ability to defeat a level 170 [[Demons|demon]] (can be [[safespot]]ted)
Family Crest.itemsRequired:
* [[Shrimps]]
* [[Salmon]]
* [[Tuna]]
* [[Bass]]
* [[Swordfish]]
* [[Pickaxe]] - [[Adamant pickaxe|adamant]] or [[Rune pickaxe|rune]] (41+ Mining) highly recommended
* 2 [[Ruby|cut rubies]]
* [[Ring mould]]
* [[Necklace mould]]
* Any [[poison cure]] (you will lose this item). Does not need to contain full doses.
* Means to cast all 4 [[Blast spells]]
Family Crest.ironmanConcerns: '''Warning:''' [[File:Hardcore ironman chat badge.png]] The player visits the [[Wilderness]] section of [[Edgeville Dungeon]] *Obtaining the cooked fish: **All raw fish except salmon can be found at [[Frankie's Fishing Emporium]] in Port Piscarilius **[[Salmon]] can be purchased cooked from the [[West Ardougne General Store]] **[[Swordfish]] can be purchased cooked from [[The Shrimp and Parrot]] in [[Brimhaven]], and 5 are received as a reward from [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Tribal Totem]] **[[Bass]] can be obtained cooked as a 1/50 drop from [[Ankou]]s, or from [[Gourmet impling]]s with [[File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter]] 28 [[Hunter]] [boostable]. Bass can also be purchased cooked from the [[Warrior Guild Food Shop]].

Fishing Contest.name: Fishing Contest
Fishing Contest.requirements: *[[File:Fishing icon.png|link=Fishing|alt=Fishing]] 10 [[Fishing]] [not boostable] [required to start]
Fishing Contest.startPoint: Mountain Dwarves at either of the entrances to the tunnel that goes under [[White Wolf Mountain]].
Fishing Contest.itemsRequired:
*[[Spade]]
*5 [[coins]] (10 if you buy a [[fishing rod]] from Jack)
*[[Garlic]] (obtainable during quest)
*[[Fishing rod]] or [[Pearl fishing rod]] ([[oily fishing rod]] does '''not''' work)
*[[Red vine worm]] (obtainable during quest)

Tribal Totem.name: Tribal Totem
Tribal Totem.requirements: * [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 21 [[Thieving]] [boostable] [not required to start]
Tribal Totem.startPoint: Speak to [[Kangai Mau]] at [[The Shrimp and Parrot]] restaurant in [[Brimhaven]].

Monk's Friend.name: Monk's Friend
Monk's Friend.requirements: The ability to run past two level 14 thieves, and one level 26.
Monk's Friend.startPoint: Speak to [[Brother Omad]] at the [[Ardougne Monastery]] south of [[East Ardougne]].
Monk's Friend.itemsRequired:
* [[Jug of water]]
* Regular [[logs]] or a regular [[plank]]

Temple of Ikov.name: Temple of Ikov
Temple of Ikov.requirements: * [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 42 [[Thieving]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Ranged icon.png|link=Ranged|alt=Ranged]] 40 [[Ranged]] [not boostable] [not required to start] - bypassable '"`UNIQ--ref-00000004-QINU`"' * The ability to defeat a level 84 enemy with Ranged
Temple of Ikov.startPoint: Speak to [[Lucien]] at the [[Flying Horse Inn]] in the north-west corner of [[East Ardougne]].
Temple of Ikov.itemsRequired:
* Any [[bow]] capable of firing [[ice arrows]] ([[yew bow]] or better) '''or''' any [[Ranged#Weapons|thrown weapon]]
* 20 unnoted [[limpwurt root]]s
*A method of reducing your weight to at least -1kg temporarily:
**[[Boots of lightness]] (can be obtained during the quest with a [[light source]] and [[slash weapon]], such as a [[lit candle]] and [[knife]])
**Other forms of [[weight-reducing clothing]] such as the [[graceful outfit]]
Temple of Ikov.enemiesToDefeat:
* [[Fire Warrior of Lesarkus]] ''(level 84)''
* [[Guardian of Armadyl]] ''(level 43) (Safespottable)'' - only if siding with Lucien
* [[Lucien]] ''(level 14)'' - only if siding with the Guardians of Armadyl
Temple of Ikov.ironmanConcerns: * [[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] 20 unnoted items need to be delivered at once. *A method of defeating the [[Fire Warrior of Lesarkus]]: **[[File:Ranged icon.png|link=Ranged|alt=Ranged]] 40 [not boostable] and access to a [[Yew longbow]] or better. [[Yew longbow]]s can be obtained as a rare drop from [[young impling]]s. **'''OR''' [[Darts]] or [[Throwing knives]] to bypass the Ranged requirement.

Clock Tower.name: Clock Tower
Clock Tower.requirements: The ability to run past level 53 [[Ogre]]s
Clock Tower.startPoint: Talk to [[Brother Kojo]] in the [[Clock Tower (building)|Clock Tower]] south of [[East Ardougne]].
Clock Tower.itemsRequired:
* [[Bucket of water]] (obtainable during quest) 
** Alternatively, a [[Jug of water]], [[Ice gloves]], or [[Smiths gloves (i)]]

Holy Grail.name: Holy Grail
Holy Grail.requirements: *Completion of the following quests: **[[Merlin's Crystal]] *[[File:Attack icon.png|link=Attack|alt=Attack]] 20 [[Attack]] [not boostable] [not required to start] *Must be able to defeat a level 120 [[Black Knight Titan]] (can be [[safespot]]ted or [[flinch]]ed)
Holy Grail.ironmanConcerns: [[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] The player briefly visits [[Entrana]].

Tree Gnome Village.name: Tree Gnome Village
Tree Gnome Village.requirements: * The ability to defeat a level 112 [[Khazard warlord]]
Tree Gnome Village.startPoint: Centre of the [[Tree Gnome Village (location)|Tree Gnome Village]] [[Gnome Maze|Maze]], talk to [[King Bolren]].
Tree Gnome Village.itemsRequired:
* 6 normal [[logs]] (or an [[axe]], obtainable during the quest by killing [[goblin]]s in the Tree Gnome Village maze)
* Combat equipment
* Food

Fight Arena.name: Fight Arena
Fight Arena.requirements: The ability to defeat level 44, 63 and 137 enemies (all can be [[safespot]]ted)
Fight Arena.startPoint: Talk to [[Lady Servil]]. She is west by south-west of the [[Ardougne Monastery|Monastery]] that is south of [[Ardougne]].

Hazeel Cult.name: Hazeel Cult
Hazeel Cult.requirements: Able to defeat a level 13 cultist (this applies only if you're taking Ceril's side)
Hazeel Cult.startPoint: Central [[Ardougne]], south of [[King Lathas]]' [[Ardougne Castle|castle]]. Talk to [[Ceril Carnillean]].

Sheep Herder.name: Sheep Herder
Sheep Herder.startPoint: Speak to [[Councillor Halgrive]] outside of the [[East Ardougne]] church.

Plague City.name: Plague City
Plague City.startPoint: Talk to [[Edmond]], living next to the wall surrounding [[West Ardougne]], north of [[Ardougne Castle]].
Plague City.itemsRequired: * [[Dwellberries]] (Spawns in [[McGrubor's Wood]], squeeze through the loose railing, use ALS, or [[Telekinetic Grab]] them. They can be bought from [[Heckel Funch]] or [[Hudo]] in the [[Tree Gnome Stronghold]] or grown with 36 [[Farming]].) *[[Rope]] (Purchasable in the [[East Ardougne]] [[general store]], [[Port Khazard]] [[general store]], [[Ned]], or a spawn in [[Karamja]] general store.) *[[Spade]] (One spawns near Edmond.) *1-4 [[Bucket of water|buckets of water]] (four uses required, there is a [[water source]] and [[bucket]] spawn nearby) *[[Hangover cure]] or the ingredients to make one: **[[Chocolate dust]] ***[[Chocolate bar]] ***[[Knife]] or [[pestle and mortar]] **[[Bucket of milk]] (Obtained by using a bucket on a [[dairy cow]], one is north of [[Ardougne]], or bought from [[Hudo]] or [[Heckel Funch]].) **[[Snape grass]] (Spawns west of the [[Crafting Guild]] or the peninsula north-east of [[Hosidius]]. It can be grown at 61 [[Farming]]. Can also be obtained from killing [[Tribesmen]] in [[Karamja]].) *[[Picture]] of [[Elena]] (Inside Alrena and Edmond's house)
Plague City.ironmanConcerns:
* [[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] The [[hangover cure]] can be made before the quest starts by combining milk, chocolate dust, and snape grass to conserve inventory space.
* [[File:Group ironman chat badge.png]] The [[hangover cure]] itself is an '''untradeable item''' so if preparing for Group Ironman, do not premake these as you will be unable to share them with your group through Group Storage or Trading.

Sea Slug.name: Sea Slug

The Tourist Trap.name: The Tourist Trap
The Tourist Trap.requirements: * [[File:Fletching icon.png|link=Fletching|alt=Fletching]] 10 [[Fletching]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 20 [[Smithing]] [boostable] [not required to start] * The ability to defeat a level 47 enemy

Watchtower.name: Watchtower

Watchtower.startPoint: Begin the quest by speaking to [[Watchtower Wizard]] north of [[Yanille]] in the [[Watchtower (building)|Watchtower]]. You must climb the [[trellis]] on the north side of the tower to get up there for the first time.
Watchtower.itemsRequired:
* 20 [[coins]]
* [[Gold bar]]
* [[Tinderbox]]
* [[Death rune]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Pickaxe]]
* [[Dragon bones]]
* 2 [[rope]]s (2nd rope obtainable during the quest)
* [[Guam potion (unf)]] or [[guam leaf]] and a [[vial of water]] (vial of water obtainable during the quest)

* [[Pestle and mortar]] (obtainable during the quest)

Requires completion of [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] Prince Ali Rescue

Legends' Quest.name: Legends' Quest

*[[Iron bar]]

Accessible via [[File:Minigame icon.png|link=Minigames|alt=Minigames]] Clan Wars [[Minigame Teleport]] **1/42.67 drop from [[dwarf|dwarves]] ([[File:Attack style icon.png|link=Combat level|alt=Combat level]] 10 ) in the mines under Falador **1/34.42 drop from sorting [[small salvage]] with [[File:Sailing icon.png|link=Sailing|alt=Sailing]] 15 [[Sailing]]

Eadgar's Ruse.name: Eadgar's Ruse

Requires completion of [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] Prince Ali Rescue and [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 45 [[Thieving]].

Big Chompy Bird Hunting.name: Big Chompy Bird Hunting

Elemental Workshop I.name: Elemental Workshop I
Elemental Workshop I.requirements: * [[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 20 [[Mining]] [boostable] [not required to start] '"`UNIQ--ref-00000018-QINU`"' * [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 20 [[Smithing]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 20 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [not required to start]

Regicide.name: Regicide
Regicide.requirements: * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Underground Pass]] *** [[Biohazard]] **** [[Plague City]] * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 10 [[Crafting]] [not boostable] [[Category:Unknown start requirement status]] * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 56 [[Agility]] [boostable] [not required to start] * The ability to defeat a level 110 [[Tyras guard]] (can be [[safespotted]])

Tai Bwo Wannai Trio.name: Tai Bwo Wannai Trio
Tai Bwo Wannai Trio.requirements: * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 15 [[Agility]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Cooking icon.png|link=Cooking|alt=Cooking]] 30 [[Cooking]] [not boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Fishing icon.png|link=Fishing|alt=Fishing]] 5 [[Fishing]] [boostable] [not required to start] '"`UNIQ--ref-00000006-QINU`"' * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Jungle Potion]] *** [[Druidic Ritual]]

* [[Seaweed]] (obtainable during the quest)

A [[steel spear]] spawns in the Ancient Prison in [[Neypotzli]] at the western wall. Alternatively, it may be bought from the [[Mount Karuulm Weapon Shop]], [[Fortis Blacksmith]] in [[Varlamore]], or dropped by enemies such as [[Moss Giant]]s, [[Jogres]], [[Tribesmen]], and [[Hobgoblins]]

Troll Stronghold.name: Troll Stronghold
Troll Stronghold.requirements: * Completion of [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Death Plateau]] * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 15 [[Agility]] [boostable] [not required to start] (47 is recommended) * The ability to defeat a level 113 [[Troll General]] (can be [[safespot]]ted)
Troll Stronghold.enemiesToDefeat: * [[Dad]] ''(level 101)'' (can be safespotted) * [[Troll General]] ''(level 113)'' (can be safespotted) * [[Berry]] and [[Twig]] ''(both level 71)'' (can be safespotted) '''Only''' if you have less than [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 30 [[Thieving]] or fail to pickpocket them (can be safespotted)

Shades of Mort'ton.name: Shades of Mort'ton
Shades of Mort'ton.requirements: * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Priest in Peril]] * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 20 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore]] 15 [[Herblore]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Firemaking icon.png|link=Firemaking|alt=Firemaking]] 5 [[Firemaking]] [boostable] [not required to start] * Must be able to defeat 5 level-40 [[Loar Shade]]s. * Must be able to survive an onslaught when rebuilding the Temple (Being surrounded by many players makes this much easier). * Access to [[Mort'ton]]
Shades of Mort'ton.startPoint: Find the [[Diary (Shades of Mort'ton)|Diary of Herbi Flax]] on a shelf in a house at the village of [[Mort'ton]].
Shades of Mort'ton.itemsRequired: * 1000+ [[coins]] (bring plenty of money just in case) * 2 [[Tarromin potion (unf)]] OR 2 [[vials of water]] and 2 [[tarromins]] (both obtainable during the quest) * 2 [[ashes]] *[[Tinderbox]] *[[Logs]] OR an [[axe]] to obtain some * 1 [[hammer]] **Using a [[Flamtaer hammer]] is '''highly recommended''' in case the minigame is unpopulated, as a regular hammer is insufficient to build the temple alone. An additional 13,000 coins (or 5,264 on the [[Grand Exchange]]) allows you to buy a [[Flamtaer hammer]] from Razmire.

The Fremennik Trials.name: The Fremennik Trials
The Fremennik Trials.requirements:
* Ability to defeat a level-69 [[Draugen]]
* Ability to defeat a [[Koschei|fairly strong warrior]] without [[armour]], [[weapons]], or [[spells]]
The Fremennik Trials.startPoint: Speak to [[Brundt the Chieftain]] (located in the longhall) in [[Rellekka]].
The Fremennik Trials.itemsRequired: * 5,252 [[coins]] * [[Beer]] (obtainable during quest) * [[Tinderbox]] * Either a [[raw shark]], [[raw manta ray]], or [[raw sea turtle]] * [[Lyre]], obtainable as a drop from [[Lanzig]], [[Borrokar]], [[Lensa]], or [[Freidir]], or the skills and materials to make one: ** [[File:Fletching icon.png|link=Fletching|alt=Fletching]] 25 [[Fletching]], [[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] 40 [[Woodcutting]], and [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 40 [[Crafting]] (all [[boostable]]) ** Woodcutting [[axe]] ** [[Knife]] ** [[Potato]] (obtainable during quest) ** [[Onion]] (obtainable during quest) ** [[Cabbage]] (obtainable during quest)
The Fremennik Trials.enemiesToDefeat:
* [[Koschei the deathless]] (first three forms)
* [[Draugen]] ''(level 69)''
'''OPTIONAL'''
* [[Lanzig]], [[Borrokar]], [[Lensa]], or [[Freidir]] ''(level 48)'' (multiple times)
The Fremennik Trials.ironmanConcerns: * [[File:Fishing icon.png|link=Fishing|alt=Fishing]] 76 [[Fishing]] [boostable] is required to fish for [[raw shark]]s yourself, but there are multiple alternatives: ** [[Rufus' Meat Emporium]] in [[Canifis]] sells a single [[raw shark]]. ** [[Frankie's Fishing Emporium]] in [[Port Piscarilius]] sells [[raw shark]]. ** [[River troll]]s in the [[Enchanted Valley]] drop them commonly, but require access to [[fairy rings]]. ** [[Waterfiend]]s, combat level 115, rarely drop noted [[raw shark]]. ** [[Mogre]]s, combat level 60, require completion of [[Skippy and the Mogres]], [[File:Slayer icon.png|link=Slayer|alt=Slayer]] 32 [[Slayer]] [boostable], and [[fishing explosives]] to attack. They can rarely drop a [[raw shark]]. ** [[Wintertodt]] can drop a [[raw shark]] after [[File:Fishing icon.png|link=Fishing|alt=Fishing]] 43 [[Fishing]], though it will be very rare, but chances increase with Fishing level. ** [[Raw shark]] has a slight chance to drop from salvaging [[Barracuda salvage]]. * [[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] Sections of this quest have strict inventory requirements: ** [[#Thorvald the Warrior|Thorvald the Warrior]]: No weapons, armour, or runes. (A [[Looting bag]] is not allowed, regardless of its contents) ** [[#Peer the Seer|Peer the Seer]]: No items '''at all''' equipped or in your inventory.

Horror from the Deep.name: Horror from the Deep
Horror from the Deep.requirements: * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 35 [[Agility]] [boostable] [not required to start] * Completion of [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl]]
Horror from the Deep.startPoint: Speak with [[Larrissa]], who is outside the [[Lighthouse]], north of [[Barbarian Outpost]].
Horror from the Deep.itemsRequired:
*[[Fire rune]]
*[[Air rune]]
*[[Water rune]]
*[[Earth rune]]
*Any [[sword]] or [[longsword]] that you are willing to lose (except [[rusty sword]] and [[prop sword]])
*Any [[arrow]] (except [[ogre arrows]] and [[training arrows]])
*[[Molten glass]]
*[[Tinderbox]]
*[[Hammer]]
* 60 [[steel nails]]
* 2 regular [[plank]]s (can be obtained from [[Barbarian Outpost]])
*[[Swamp tar]]
*At least one [[combat style]] to defeat the [[Dagannoth Mother]] - she cycles every 18 seconds between only being vulnerable to one of six different types of attack
**'''Highly recommended''' to bring means to deal damage with all of the elemental [[Magic]] types ([[air spell|air]], [[water spell|water]], [[earth spell|earth]], and [[fire spells]])
**You may also bring means to deal [[Ranged]] and [[Melee]] damage (she has high resistance to melee)
Horror from the Deep.enemiesToDefeat:
* [[Dagannoth (Horror from the Deep)]] ''(level 100)''  ''(can be completely safespotted)'' 
* [[Dagannoth Mother]] ''(level 100)''  ''(with use of a safespot and [[Protect from Missiles]], all damage can be negated)''

Throne of Miscellania.name: Throne of Miscellania
Throne of Miscellania.requirements:
* Completion of the following quests:
** [[Heroes' Quest]]
*** [[Shield of Arrav]]
*** [[Lost City]]
*** [[Merlin's Crystal]]
*** [[Dragon Slayer I]]
** [[The Fremennik Trials]]
Throne of Miscellania.startPoint: Talk to [[King Vargas]] in the [[Miscellania Castle]]. Take the longboat from [[Rellekka]] to access [[Miscellania]].
Throne of Miscellania.itemsRequired: * [[Iron bar]] * Any common, non-silver [[ring]] (such as a [[gold ring]]) that you're willing to lose ''(not [[Onyx ring|onyx]]/[[Dragonstone ring|dragonstone]]/[[Explorer's ring|explorer]]/[[Beacon Ring|beacon]]/[['perfect' ring]]/[[Ring of nature|nature]]/[[Pineapple ring|pineapple]]/[[Ring of charos|Charos]]/[[Fremennik rings|fremennik]]/[[Ancient rings|ancient]])'' *At least one of the following to gain favour during the quest **1,875 to buy flowers from [[Flower Girl]] (fastest method) **An axe and [[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] 45 [[Woodcutting]] to cut [[maple tree]]s **A rake and [[File:Farming icon.png|link=Farming|alt=Farming]] 10 [[Farming]] to rake flax **A pickaxe and [[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 35 [[Mining]] to mine [[coal]] **A [[harpoon]] or [[lobster pot]] and [[File:Fishing icon.png|link=Fishing|alt=Fishing]] 35 [[Fishing]] to fish [[tuna]], [[lobsters]] or [[swordfish]] * [[Logs]] (obtainable during the quest if you bring an axe)

Monkey Madness I.name: Monkey Madness I
Monkey Madness I.requirements:
* Completion of the following quests:
** [[The Grand Tree]]
** [[Tree Gnome Village]]
* The ability to defeat a level 195 [[Jungle Demon]]
Monkey Madness I.startPoint: Talk to [[King Narnode Shareen]] in the [[Grand Tree]].
Monkey Madness I.itemsRequired:
* A [[gold bar]]
* Five empty inventory slots
* A [[ball of wool]]
* [[Monkey bones]] or [[Monkey corpse|corpse]] from [[Karamja]] (obtainable during quest)
* Five [[banana]]s (obtainable during quest)
Monkey Madness I.ironmanConcerns: * [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 40 [[Smithing]] [boostable] (to make the gold bar if not dropped by a monster) or [[File:Magic icon.png|link=Magic|alt=Magic]] 33 [[Magic]] [boostable] (to telegrab a gold bar from [[Varrock west bank]] basement) or [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 5 [[Thieving]] to steal from a [[crafting stall]] in Keldagrim. A gold bar is also a reward from [[The Digsite]], [[Goblin Diplomacy]], and [[Waterfall Quest]]

Haunted Mine.name: Haunted Mine
Haunted Mine.requirements: * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Priest in Peril]] * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 35 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [not required to start] * The ability to defeat a level 95 enemy * Access to [[Abandoned Mine]]
Haunted Mine.startPoint: Speak to the [[Zealot]] at the mines in [[Morytania]] on the path to Mort'ton.

Troll Romance.name: Troll Romance
Troll Romance.requirements: * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 28 [[Agility]] [boostable] [[Category:Unknown start requirement status]] * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Troll Stronghold]] *** [[Death Plateau]] * The ability to defeat a level 113 [[Arrg|troll]]
Troll Romance.startPoint: Speak to [[Ug]] at the [[Troll Stronghold (location)|Troll Stronghold]].
Troll Romance.itemsRequired:
* An [[iron bar]]
* [[Maple logs|Maple]] or [[yew logs]]
* [[Rope]]
* [[Climbing boots]] (not needed if using [[Trollheim Teleport]])
* [[Wax]] (can be made ahead of time)
** A [[bucket of wax]] (use [[insect repellent]] on a beehive followed by a [[bucket]])
** A [[cake tin]]
** [[Swamp tar]]
Troll Romance.enemiesToDefeat: [[Arrg]] ''(level 113)'' ([[safespot]]table; difficult to reach) '''Note:''' This fight is not a safe death.
Troll Romance.ironmanConcerns: * [[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] 45 [[Woodcutting]] [boostable] to cut a maple log ** '''OR''' Enough combat stats and supplies to get a 1/128 drop of yew logs from [[Swamp Crab]]s (requires [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Priest in Peril]] ). ** '''OR''' Enough supply of [[Serum 208]] to get a 1/128 drop of maple logs from curing [[Afflicted]] (requires [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Shades of Mort'ton]] ). ** '''OR''' [[Throne of Miscellania]] completed to obtain maple logs from [[managing Miscellania]]. ** '''OR''' [[File:Firemaking icon.png|link=Firemaking|alt=Firemaking]] 50 [[Firemaking]] [not boostable] to get a maple/yew log from [[Reward Cart]] via [[Wintertodt]]. ** '''OR''' Completing [[Hunters' Rumours]] with [[File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter]] 46 [[Hunter]] [not boostable] to receive [[Hunters' loot sack]] (drop chance based on [[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] level) ** '''OR''' High enough combat stats to kill [[Giant Mole]] for a 1/12.8 drop of yew logs. *A method to obtain an iron bar: **[[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 15 [[Mining]] and [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 15 [[Smithing]] if smelting [[iron ore]] **Spawn in [[Thurid's Brain Buckets]] on the [[Sunset Coast]] in [[Varlamore]] (requires [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Children of the Sun]] ) **Spawn in level 18 [[Wilderness]] north-west of the [[Ferox Enclave]], next to the bears west of the Graveyard of Shadows. Accessible via [[File:Minigame icon.png|link=Minigames|alt=Minigames]] Clan Wars [[grouping]] teleport **1/42.67 drop from [[dwarf|dwarves]] ([[File:Attack style icon.png|link=Combat level|alt=Combat level]] 10 ) in the mines under Falador **1/34.42 drop from sorting [[small salvage]] with [[File:Sailing icon.png|link=Sailing|alt=Sailing]] 15 [[Sailing]]

In Search of the Myreque.name: In Search of the Myreque
In Search of the Myreque.requirements: * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Nature Spirit]] *** [[Priest in Peril]] *** [[The Restless Ghost]] * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 25 [[Agility]] [boostable] [[Category:Unknown start requirement status]] * The ability to defeat a level 97 foe ([[safespot]]table)
In Search of the Myreque.startPoint: Speak to [[Vanstrom Klause]] at the [[Hair of the Dog]] tavern in [[Canifis]].
In Search of the Myreque.itemsRequired:
* A [[steel longsword]]
* 2 [[steel sword]]s
* A [[steel mace]]
* A [[steel warhammer]]
* A [[steel dagger]]
* 225 [[steel nails]]
* A [[Druid pouch]] containing at least 5 charges (3 charges must be added per fill)
**6 [[Mort myre fungus]] OR 3 [[Mort myre pear]] OR 3 [[Mort myre stem]] to fill the pouch
**A [[Silver sickle (b)]] to collect these items for the charges if not buying from the [[Grand Exchange]]
* A [[hammer]] or [[Imcando hammer]]
* 6 normal [[plank]]s
* 10 [[coins]] ''or'' a [[ring of charos (a)]]
In Search of the Myreque.ironmanConcerns: All of the required steel weapons can be purchased from [[Briget's Weapons]] in [[Shayzien]], except for the [[steel warhammer]], which can be purchased from [[Vigr's Warhammers]] in [[Keldagrim]], or from [[Mount Karuulm Weapon Shop]] in [[Mount Karuulm]].

Creature of Fenkenstrain.name: Creature of Fenkenstrain
Creature of Fenkenstrain.requirements: * Completion of [[Priest in Peril]] * Partial completion of [[The Restless Ghost]] * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 20 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 25 [[Thieving]] [boostable] [not required to start] * Able to defeat a level 51 monster and run past level 72 monsters
Creature of Fenkenstrain.startPoint: Read the [[signpost (Creature of Fenkenstrain)|signpost]] in the middle of [[Canifis]].
Creature of Fenkenstrain.itemsRequired: * [[Ghostspeak amulet]] * [[Silver bar]] * 3 [[bronze wire]] (unnoted) * [[Needle]] ([[costume needle]] does not work) * 5 [[thread]] * [[Spade]] * 50 [[coins]] '''OR''' 1 [[law rune|law]] & 1 [[air rune]] for [[Telekinetic Grab]] (requires [[File:Magic icon.png|link=Magic|alt=Magic]] 33 [[Magic]])
Creature of Fenkenstrain.ironmanConcerns: * [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 4 [[Smithing]] [boostable] (to make a [[bronze wire]])

Roving Elves.name: Roving Elves
Roving Elves.requirements: * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Regicide]] *** [[Underground Pass]] **** [[Biohazard]] ***** [[Plague City]] ** [[Waterfall Quest]] * The ability to defeat a level 84 enemy unarmed, with [[Glarial's Tomb#Restricted items|heavy restrictions]] * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 56 [[Agility]] [boostable] [not required to start], unless travelling with a [[charter ship]] to the elven woods
Roving Elves.startPoint: Talk to [[Islwyn]] inside the elven woods of [[Isafdar]].
Roving Elves.itemsRequired:
* [[Glarial's pebble]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Key (Waterfall Dungeon)|Key]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Spade]]
* [[Rope]]
Roving Elves.enemiesToDefeat: * [[Moss Guardian]] ''(level 84)'' (has to be killed with [[Glarial's Tomb#Restricted items|restricted items]], can be [[flinched]])
Roving Elves.ironmanConcerns: [[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] You must briefly visit Glarial's Tomb which has [[Glarial's Tomb#Restricted items|significant item restrictions]]. Items dropped outside the tomb may be picked back up within three minutes.

Ghosts Ahoy.name: Ghosts Ahoy
Ghosts Ahoy.requirements: * Completed [[Priest in Peril]] * Completed [[The Restless Ghost]] * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 25 [[Agility]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Cooking icon.png|link=Cooking|alt=Cooking]] 20 [[Cooking]] [boostable] [not required to start]
Ghosts Ahoy.startPoint: Talk to [[Velorina]] in [[Port Phasmatys]]. Can use a charter ship for 1,300 gp in Port Sarim talking to [[Trader Stan]] on the southern-most dock.
Ghosts Ahoy.itemsRequired:
* Some amount of [[Ecto-tokens]]:
** 31 [[Ecto-token]]s (20 with [[ring of charos (a)]])
** OR 25 Ecto-tokens (10 with ring) using [[charter ship]]s
** OR 1 bone, 1 pot, and 1 bucket for every 5 ecto-tokens required (see [[Ghosts_Ahoy#Pre-quest: Obtaining Ecto-tokens at the Ectofuntus|Pre-quest]] for more info)
* ~400 [[Coins]]
* [[Ghostspeak amulet]]
* [[Bucket of milk]]
* [[Silk]]
* 3 colours of [[dye]] (The dye colours you will need are random. If you want to save a trip, have 3 [[Red dye|red]], 3 [[Blue dye|blue]], and 3 [[yellow dye]]s. That way, you can mix whatever colours you end up needing.)
*[[Spade]]
*[[Oak longbow]]
*[[Knife]] (can be purchased from the Canifis general store)
*[[Needle]] and [[thread]] (can be purchased from the Canifis general store) or a [[costume needle]]
* One extra [[bucket of slime]] for colouring the bed sheet (can be purchased from a [[Charter ship]] crewmember at the port).
* [[Nettle tea]] (prepared ahead of time, within a [[bowl of water]]) ''or'' items to make nettle tea:
** A [[tinderbox]] and a [[log]] of which you have the [[Firemaking]] level to light. Tinderbox can be purchased from the general store during quest
**[[Gloves]] (must be closed fingered - [[Slayer gloves]], [[Ranger gloves]], [[Infinity gloves]], [[Moonclan gloves]], [[Granite gloves]], [[Lunar gloves]] and [[Beekeeper's gloves]] won't work)
**[[Nettles]] (obtainable during the quest)
**[[Bowl of water]] (empty bowl can be purchased during quest -- the [[gold bowl]] won't work)
Ghosts Ahoy.ironmanConcerns: [[File:Ultimate_ironman_chat_badge.png]] [[Nettle tea]] and [[bucket of milk]] can be combined before the quest starts to save inventory space

One Small Favour.name: One Small Favour
One Small Favour.requirements: * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Rune Mysteries]] ** [[Shilo Village]] *** [[Jungle Potion]] **** [[Druidic Ritual]] * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 36 [[Agility]] [boostable] [[Category:Unknown start requirement status]] * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 25 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [[Category:Unknown start requirement status]] * [[File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore]] 18 [[Herblore]] [boostable] [[Category:Unknown start requirement status]] * [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 30 [[Smithing]] [boostable] [[Category:Unknown start requirement status]]
One Small Favour.startPoint: Speak to [[Yanni Salika]] in [[Shilo Village (location)|Shilo Village]].
One Small Favour.itemsRequired: * 4 [[steel bar]]s * [[Bronze bar]] * [[Iron bar]] * The ingredients required to make a [[Guthix rest]]: ** 2 [[Guam leaves]] ** [[Marrentill]] ** [[Harralander]] ** [[Cup of hot water]] (obtainable during the quest) * [[Hammer]] (obtainable during the quest) or [[Imcando hammer]] * 5 [[pigeon cage|pigeon cages]] (obtainable during the quest) ** '''Note:''' The pigeons do not need to be let out of the cages. * [[Pot]] (obtainable during the quest) * [[Soft clay]] (obtained during the quest) * Two of each of the following cut gems, or a [[chisel]] to cut the uncut gems received during the quest (high chance to crush them, up to 2 replacements available for 500 coins each during the quest) ** [[Opal]] ** [[Jade (gem)|Jade]] ** [[Red topaz]] ** [[Sapphire]] (cannot be crushed, so you may choose to bring a [[chisel]] instead to cut the uncut sapphires given during the quest)
One Small Favour.ironmanConcerns: *A method of acquiring [[Marrentill]]: **1/14.8 drop from [[chaos druid]]s for the grimy herb. **Picking the herbs in the [[Sorceress's Garden]] winter garden for [[marrentill]] (1/3.85). Requires completion of [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] Prince Ali Rescue. *A method of acquiring [[Harralander]]: **1/25.4 drop from [[chaos druid]]s for the grimy herb. Requires [[File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore]] 20 [[Herblore]] to clean. **Picking the herbs in the [[Sorceress's Garden]] winter garden for [[harralander]] (1/4.09). Requires completion of [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] Prince Ali Rescue. *A method of acquiring [[Guam leaves]]: **1/11.1 drop from [[chaos druid]]s for the grimy herb. **Picking the herbs in the [[Sorceress's Garden]] winter garden for [[guam leaves]] (1/3.37). Requires completion of [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] Prince Ali Rescue.

Mountain Daughter.name: Mountain Daughter
Mountain Daughter.requirements: * [[File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility]] 20 [[Agility]] [boostable] [not required to start] '"`UNIQ--ref-00000018-QINU`"' * The ability to defeat a level 70 [[The Kendal|monster]] (can be [[safespot|safespotted]])
Mountain Daughter.startPoint: Talk to [[Hamal the Chieftain]] in the [[Mountain Camp]] east of [[Rellekka]]. To get in, take the path north of the [[Golden Apple Tree]] and use a [[rope]] on the boulder behind the guard (see below for more details).
Mountain Daughter.itemsRequired:
* [[Rope]]
* [[Pickaxe]]
* [[Axe]]
* [[Plank]]
* [[Staff]] or a [[pole]] (obtainable during the quest, [[Dramen Staff]] does not work, but [[elemental staves]] and [[Lunar staff]] do work)
* [[Gloves]] (excluding: [[Slayer gloves|Slayer]], [[Ranger gloves|Ranger]], [[Moonclan gloves|Moonclan]], [[Lunar gloves|Lunar]], [[vambraces]], [[mystic]] and random event apparel)

Between a Rock....name: Between a Rock...
Between a Rock....requirements: * Completion of the following quests: ** [[Dwarf Cannon]] ** [[Fishing Contest]] * [[File:Defence icon.png|link=Defence|alt=Defence]] 30 [[Defence]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 40 [[Mining]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing]] 50 [[Smithing]] [boostable] [not required to start] * The ability to defeat a level 75-125 enemy ''(depends on how much gold you mine)''
Between a Rock....startPoint: Speak to [[Dondakan the Dwarf]] at the [[Keldagrim south-west mine]].
Between a Rock....itemsRequired:
* A [[pickaxe]]
* 4 [[gold bar]]s (You will need an extra bar and [[Telekinetic Grab|telegrab]] if you want to keep a [[golden cannonball]] for after the quest)
* A [[hammer]]
* An [[ammo mould]] ''(can be bought for 5 coins during the quest)'' or a [[double ammo mould]]
* ~830 [[coins]] ''(for cart and ferry)''

The Feud.name: The Feud
The Feud.requirements: * [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 30 [[Thieving]] [not boostable] [required to start] * The ability to kill a level 70 [[Bandit champion|bandit]] and a level 75 [[Tough Guy|Menaphite]] (both can be safespotted).
The Feud.startPoint: Talk to [[Ali Morrisane]] east of the Gem Trader in northern [[Al Kharid]].
The Feud.itemsRequired:
* 501+ [[coins]]
* [[Gloves]] - (see [[Cactus (The Feud)|this page]] for gloves that '''do''' work; [[Barrows gloves]], [[ice gloves]], [[vambraces]],  and [[Slayer gloves]] do '''not''' work!)
* [[Kharidian headpiece]] (can be bought from [[Ali Morrisane]])
* [[Fake beard]] (can be bought from [[Ali Morrisane]])
* 3 [[beer]]s (obtainable during the quest, bought from [[Ali the Barman]] for 2 coins each)
* [[Bucket]] or [[Ugthanki dung]] (obtainable during the quest, spawns at the location it is needed – bring three extra buckets, four total, if you plan on doing [[My Arm's Big Adventure]] as three Ugthanki dung are needed for that quest). One more might be needed for [[Forgettable Tale...]] (1/25 chance for each player).
* If you have the [[snake charm]] in your bank already, you will need to retrieve it.

The Golem.name: The Golem
The Golem.requirements: * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 20 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 25 [[Thieving]] [boostable] [not required to start]
The Golem.startPoint: Talk to the [[clay golem]] in the ruins of [[Uzer]], east of the [[Shantay Pass]] in the [[Kharidian Desert]].
The Golem.itemsRequired:
* [[Vial]]
* [[Pestle and mortar]]
* [[Papyrus]] (can be bought from [[Ali Morrisane]] for 10gp)
* 4 [[soft clay]] (or a [[bracelet of clay]] and a [[pickaxe]] to mine north-west of the ruins)
* [[Phoenix feather]] (can be obtained north-west of the ruins)
* Means to enter the desert (such as the [[Shantay pass (item)|Shantay pass]], [[Teleport tablets]] or [[Teleport scrolls|scrolls]], [[Fairy rings]] or the [[Pharaoh's sceptre]])

Desert Treasure I.name: Desert Treasure I
Desert Treasure I.requirements: * Completion of the following quests: ** [[The Dig Site]] ** [[Temple of Ikov]] ** [[The Tourist Trap]] ** [[Troll Stronghold]] *** [[Death Plateau]] ** [[Priest in Peril]] ** [[Waterfall Quest]] * [[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 53 [[Thieving]] [not boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Magic icon.png|link=Magic|alt=Magic]] 50 [[Magic]] [not boostable] [[Category:Unknown start requirement status]] * [[File:Firemaking icon.png|link=Firemaking|alt=Firemaking]] 50 [[Firemaking]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Slayer icon.png|link=Slayer|alt=Slayer]] 10 [[Slayer]] [not boostable] [not required to start] '''or''' the [[gas mask]] from [[Plague City]] * Access to [[Morytania Graveyard]]
Desert Treasure I.startPoint: Speak to [[Asgarnia Smith]] at the [[Bedabin Camp]].
Desert Treasure I.itemsRequired:
* 10+ [[Shantay pass (item)|Shantay pass]]es '''or''' a way to enter the [[Kharidian Desert]] without one
* 650 [[Coins]]
* 12 [[Magic logs]] (can be noted)
* 6 [[Steel bar]] (can be noted)
* 6 [[Molten glass]] (can be noted)
* [[Ashes]]
* [[Charcoal]]
* 1 [[blood rune]]
* [[Bones]] (can be noted to prevent accidental burial)
* A [[silver bar]]
* [[Garlic powder]] (made by grinding [[garlic]] in a [[pestle and mortar]])
* [[Spice]] ([[gnome spice]] and [[Evil Dave]]'s spices will '''not''' work)
* A sweet ([[cake]], [[chocolate cake]] (part cakes are accepted), [[chocolate bar]], [[cooking apple]], or [[pineapple pizza]])
* [[Spiked boots]] (obtainable during the quest by bringing [[Dunstan]] [[climbing boots]] and an [[iron bar]]; do so '''before''' attempting to obtain the [[ice diamond]])
* [[Climbing boots]] (if [[Eadgar's Ruse]] isn't completed and/or you lack 61 [[Magic]] for the [[Trollheim Teleport]])
* A [[facemask]], [[slayer helmet]], or [[gas mask]]
* A [[tinderbox]]
* 20-50+ [[lockpick]]s
Desert Treasure I.enemiesToDefeat:
* [[Dessous]] ''(level 139)''
* 5 [[ice troll]]s ''(level 120-124)''
* [[Kamil]] ''(level 154)''
* [[Fareed]] ''(level 167)''
* [[Damis]] ''(2 forms, levels 103 and 174)''
* You will also need to tank hits by many high level enemies throughout most parts of the quest.
Desert Treasure I.ironmanConcerns:
* [[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] The player briefly visits [[Entrana]].
*Player will need to obtain [[Magic logs]]; see the "enchanting the mirrors" section for more information
*Lockpicks and antipoisons may be pickpocketed from the [[Bandit (Bandit Camp)|Bandits]] in the vicinity of the chest where they're needed.

Icthlarin's Little Helper.name: Icthlarin's Little Helper
Icthlarin's Little Helper.requirements: * Completion of [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Gertrude's Cat]] * The ability to defeat a level 91 monster.
Icthlarin's Little Helper.startPoint: Speak to the [[wanderer]] in the camp west of the [[Agility Pyramid]].
Icthlarin's Little Helper.itemsRequired:
* [[cat|Regular]] or [[overgrown cat|overgrown cat]], [[hellcat]], or [[kitten]]. No food is required as the kitten can stay in your inventory for the most part, or automatically go in/out of your inventory.
* [[Tinderbox]]
* [[Willow log]]
* [[Bag of salt]] (can be bought from any [[Slayer Master]], other players, or the [[Grand Exchange]]) '''or''' an empty [[bucket]] to obtain a [[pile of salt]] in Sophanem
* [[Bucket of sap]] (use a [[knife]] on an [[evergreen tree]] or a [[Tree#Single_canopy|regular tree]] with the description "a commonly found tree" with a bucket in your inventory)
* Full [[waterskin]] to give away (can be bought for 30 coins at Shantay pass)
* [[Linen (Icthlarin's Little Helper)|Linen]] (Can be bought on The Grand Exchange or bought from [[Raetul]] in Sophanem for 30 coins during the quest)
* Means to enter the desert. (Such as the [[Shantay pass (item)|Shantay pass]], [[Teleport tablets]] or [[Teleport scrolls|scrolls]], [[Fairy rings]] or the [[Pharaoh's sceptre]])
Icthlarin's Little Helper.enemiesToDefeat:
* [[Possessed Priest]] ''(level 91)''
* One of the level 75–81 guardians (chosen based on your stats):
** [[Apparition#Apmeken]] ''(level 75)''—uses [[Magic]]
** [[Apparition#Crondis]] ''(level 75)''—uses Magic
** [[Apparition#Scabaras]] ''(level 75)''—uses [[Melee]]
** [[Apparition#Het]] ''(level 81)''—uses Melee
It is possible to know in advance which of these guardians you're going to get, based on which jar your character obtains during the quest. See the "Second Flashback" section below.
Icthlarin's Little Helper.ironmanConcerns: *A method to obtain [[willow logs]]: **[[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] 30 [[Woodcutting]] [boostable] to cut [[willow trees]] **1/16 drop from [[Vampyre Juvinates]] (requires starting [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[In Aid of the Myreque]] ) **1/128 drop from [[Swamp Crab]]s (requires [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] [[Priest in Peril]] )

Tears of Guthix.name: Tears of Guthix
Tears of Guthix.requirements: * [[File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points]] 43 [[Quest points]] [required to start] * [[File:Firemaking icon.png|link=Firemaking|alt=Firemaking]] 49 [[Firemaking]] [boostable] [not required to start] * [[File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting]] 20 [[Crafting]] [boostable] [not required to start] '"`UNIQ--ref-0000008B-QINU`"' * [[File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining]] 20 [[Mining]] [boostable] [not required to start]

[[File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png]] This quest requires an empty inventory and no items worn.

Mourning's End Part I.name: Mourning's End Part I
Mourning's End Part I.requirements: *[[File:Ranged icon.png|link=Ranged|alt=Ranged]] 60 [[Ranged]] [not boostable] [required to start] *[[File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving]] 50 [[Thieving]] [not boostable] [required to start] *The ability to defeat a level 11 enemy with your combat stats set to 20 each. *Completion of the following quests: **[[Roving Elves]] ***[[Regicide]] ****[[Underground Pass]] *****[[Biohazard]] ******[[Plague City]] ***[[Waterfall Quest]] **[[Big Chompy Bird Hunting]] **[[Sheep Herder]]

Mourning's End Part I.itemsRequired: *[[Bear fur]] (obtainable during the quest near Jorral's Outpost) *2 [[silk]] *Each of these [[dye]]s: [[red dye|red]], [[yellow dye|yellow]], [[green dye|green]], and [[blue dye|blue]] (can be bought during the quest for 6 coins each at the [[Lletya Seamstress]]). ** You may want to bring additional dyes to collect multiple coloured toads in case you miss when firing the device. *[[Bucket of water]] (can be bought from the general store in Lletya during the quest, and used on the well) *[[Feather]] *[[Rotten apple]] ('''must''' be the rotten apple on the ground north of the [[Mourner Headquarters]] in [[West Ardougne]], obtainable during the quest) *[[Toad crunchies]] or [[Premade t'd crunch]] *[[Magic logs]] *[[Leather]] *[[Ogre bellows]] (obtainable during the quest) *[[Barrel of naphtha]], or 5-9 [[coal]] to make one *7 empty inventory spaces for the [[Mourner gear]]

Mourning's End Part I.ironmanConcerns: *A method to obtain [[magic logs]]: **[[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] 75 [[Woodcutting]] [boostable] for chopping [[magic tree]]s **[[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] 50 [[Woodcutting]] and [[File:Firemaking icon.png|link=Firemaking|alt=Firemaking]] 50 [[Firemaking]] [not boostable] to obtain magic logs as a possible reward for defeating the [[Wintertodt]] skilling boss ** [[File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting]] 50 [[Woodcutting]] and [[File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter]] 46 [[Hunter]] [not boostable] to obtain magic logs as a possible reward for completing [[Hunters' Rumours]] ** [[File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter]] 58 [[Hunter]][boostable] to obtain magic logs as a possible drop from [[nature implings]]

*[[Beer glass]] (obtainable during the quest)
*A random item from the list below (see list for details)

Garden of Tranquillity.name: Garden of Tranquillity
Garden of Tranquillity.requirements: *[[File:Farming icon.png|link=Farming|alt=Farming]] 25 [[Farming]] [not boostable] [required to start] *Completion of the following quests: **[[Creature of Fenkenstrain]] ***[[Priest in Peril]] ***[[The Restless Ghost]]

*[[Ring of charos]]
*All [[tool leprechaun]] tools
**A [[rake]]
**A [[seed dibber]] (or partial completion of the [[Farming]] portion of the [[Barbarian Training]] [[miniquest]])
**A [[spade]]
**[[Secateurs]] ([[magic secateurs]] work)
**A [[watering can]]
**A [[gardening trowel]]
*2 [[plant cure]]s
*A [[marigold seed]] (2 recommended in case of failure)
*3+ [[cabbage seed]]s (6 recommended to plant in both allotments to increase chance of survival)
*3+ [[onion seed]]s (6 recommended to plant in both allotments to increase chance of survival)
*A [[hammer]]
*A [[rune essence|rune]]/[[pure essence]]
*A [[pestle and mortar]]
*A [[filled plant pot]]
*2 [[ultracompost]]/[[supercompost]]/[[compost]] (note: [[Bottomless compost bucket]] will not work for these two required composts. The quality of these 2 composts do not matter.)

The [[hammer]] and [[pestle and mortar]] can then be safely discarded since they play no further role in the quest.

A Tail of Two Cats.name: A Tail of Two Cats

***[[Gertrude's Cat]]

The lectern is the '''only''' way to leave, as no other teleports will work (including the ring of life).
